pages.title: How the 5 stages combine
pages.text: Once a piece of gear has $(l)any$() stage written, R87's $(l)ForgeBattleHandler$() applies its effects in every $(l)LivingHurtEvent$().$(br2)The handler reads NBT вҖ” there are no separate buffs, no item attribute modifiers. Pure NBT-driven, fully data-coupled.

pages.title: Attacker Damage Formula
pages.text: When you swing a forged $(l)weapon$() at any LivingEntity:$(br2)$(c)dmg$() вҶҗ baseDamage$(br)$(c)Г— (1 + aspect.offset)$() вҖ” E$(br)$(c)Г— (1 + sharpness Г— 5%)$() вҖ” B$(br)$(c)Г— (1 + matching_echoes Г— 25%)$() вҖ” A$(br)$(c)Г— (1 + tierMult)$() вҖ” C$(br)$(c)Г— (1 + blessingBonus)$() вҖ” D$(br)$(c)Г— 1.5$() if Spark crit fires$(br)= final damage (clamped to [0.05Г—, 4.0Г—])

pages.title: Defender Reduction
pages.text: When you (Player) take damage, each of your 4 armor slots, if forged:$(br)$(b)+ ward_sockets Г— 3%$()$(br)$(b)+ tierMult Г— 0.5$()$(br)$(b)+ blessing Г— 0.25$()$(br2)All reductions sum across 4 armor pieces, capped at $(l)75% total$().$(br2)$(o)A full forged armor set with high tier and blessing approaches that 75% wall вҖ” but never beyond.$()

pages.title: Special Effects
pages.text: $(d)Spark sockets$() roll a crit each hit at $(l)2% per socket$() chance. On crit: $(l)+50% damage$() multiplied last.$(br2)$(4)Leech sockets$() heal the attacker for $(l)2% per socket Г— final damage$(). With 4 sockets and a 20-damage hit, that's $(l)+1.6 HP$()/hit.$(br2)Other socket types and 14 of the 16 blessings are placeholder вҖ” they apply their flat damage/defense bonus but no unique behavior yet.

pages.title: Worked Example
pages.text: $(o)A pyromaniac's dream:$()$(br)Iron sword, 6 damage base.$(br)+ E: $(c)Inferno Essence$() (+20%)$(br)+ B: 4Г— Sharpness (+20%)$(br)+ A: 3 zombie echoes (+75% vs zombies)$(br)+ C: Tier 3 (+25%)$(br)+ D: $(c)Solar Crown$() daytime (+50%)$(br2)vs zombie at noon: 6 Г— 1.2 Г— 1.2 Г— 1.75 Г— 1.25 Г— 1.5 = $(l)28.35$() вҶ’ clamped to $(l)24 (4Г—)$().

pages.title: Defense Example
pages.text: $(o)A walking fortress:$()$(br)Full netherite armor, 4 pieces.$(br)Each: 4Г— Ward (12%) + Tier 3 half (12.5%) + Pure blessing (7.5%) = $(b)32%$()$(br)4 pieces Г— 32% = $(b)128%$() вҶ’ capped at $(b)75%$()$(br2)Effective: incoming damage Г— 0.25. A 40-damage explosion вҶ’ 10 damage taken.

pages.title: Tooltip Reading
pages.text: Every forged piece shows in tooltip:$(br2)$(d)$(l)вңҰ Path of Artifice (N/5)$()$(br)$(6)вңҰ Crucible: ...$()$(br)$(b)в—Ү Resonance: X/4 sockets$()$(br)$(5)в—Ү Soul: X/3 echoes$()$(br)$(a)в—Ӣ Experience: ...$()$(br)$(d)в—Ӣ Celestial: ...$()$(br2)Filled stages show in color; unfilled show in dark gray italic.
